_comment: Pinned build specs for the inference engines spark runs on the DGX. Mirrors models.example.json: this tracked file seeds the gitignored templates/engines.json (the runtime copy `spark engine` reads). The pin is the COMMIT + BUILD PROVENANCE (cmake flags) — what broke serving was BUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON, not the hash, so the flags are part of the pin. `spark engine status` flags drift from the pin; `spark engine build <name>` rebuilds from it. Move a pin deliberately with --ref/--latest (re-validate after). Install PATHS live in spark.json (server_bin etc.), referenced here by path_key.

llama.label: llama.cpp llama-server — GB10/sm_121, shared-lib (ggml dynamic backends) build
